common.offline: You are offline. Calls and messages will not work until connectivity is restored.

notes.emptySubtitle: Notes will appear here after calls

transcription.title: Transkripsyon
transcription.enableForCalls: I-enable ang transkripsyon para sa aking mga tawag
transcription.disableForCalls: I-disable ang transkripsyon para sa aking mga tawag

transcription.allowOptOutDescription: Kapag naka-disable, hindi maaaring mag-opt out ang mga volunteer sa transkripsyon
transcription.managedByAdmin: Ang transkripsyon ay pinamamahalaan ng iyong admin
transcription.clientSideDescription: Transcribe calls locally in your browser. Audio never leaves your device.
transcription.localMicOnlyDescription: Only your microphone audio is captured. The caller's voice is not accessible for transcription.
transcription.notSupported: Your browser does not support in-browser transcription

shifts.title: Iskedyul ng Shift

volunteers.inviteGenerated: Na-generate na ang imbitasyon! Ibahagi ang secret key nang ligtas.

volunteers.invalidPhone: Hindi valid ang numero ng telepono. Gamitin ang E.164 format (hal. +639123456789)
volunteers.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this volunteer?

webauthn.browserNotSupported: Hindi sinusuportahan ng iyong browser ang mga passkey.

banList.confirmUnban: Sigurado ka bang gusto mong i-unban ang numerong ito?

ivr.description: Piliin kung aling mga wika ang maririnig ng tumatawag sa menu ng telepono.
ivr.atLeastOne: Kailangan ng kahit isang wikang naka-enable

phone.hint: Pumili ng bansa at ilagay ang numero

settings.title: Mga Setting ng Account
settings.hubDescription: Mga setting na nakakaapekto sa buong hub ng hotline.
settings.transcriptionDescription: Gumagamit ng AI para ma-transcribe ang mga tawag. Puwedeng i-disable bawat boluntaryo.

settings.playRingtone: Mag-play ng ringtone para sa papasok na tawag
settings.playRingtoneDescription: Nagpe-play ng tunog kapag may tumatawag
settings.browserNotificationsDescription: Magpakita ng notipikasyon ng system para sa papasok na tawag
settings.copyLink: Kopyahin ang link sa seksyong ito
settings.callPreferenceDescription: Piliin kung paano ka makakatanggap ng mga papasok na tawag
settings.callPrefPhoneDesc: Tumanggap ng mga tawag sa iyong numero ng telepono
settings.callPrefBrowserDesc: Sagutin ang mga tawag direkta sa iyong browser gamit ang WebRTC
settings.callPrefBothDesc: Patunugin ang parehong telepono at browser nang sabay
settings.webrtcNotConfigured: Hindi available ang pagtawag sa browser. Kailangang i-enable ng iyong admin ang WebRTC sa mga setting ng telephony provider.
settings.autoLockDesc: Automatically lock the app after inactivity
settings.clearCacheConfirm: Are you sure? This will clear all cached data.
settings.clearCacheDesc: Remove cached data to free up space
settings.deviceLinkDesc: Link another device to your account
settings.keyBackupWarning: Store your backup securely. Anyone with your key can access your account.
settings.logoutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to log out? Make sure you have backed up your key.
settings.spokenLanguagesDesc: Languages you can handle calls in

session.expiringWarning: Malapit nang mag-expire ang iyong session.
session.expiredDescription: Nag-expire na ang iyong session. Puwede kang mag-reconnect o mag-log in muli.

commandPalette.label: Command Palette
commandPalette.searchNotes: Maghanap ng mga tala para sa "{{query}}"
commandPalette.searchCalls: Maghanap ng mga tawag para sa "{{query}}"

shortcuts.title: Mga Shortcut sa Keyboard
shortcuts.description: Mga mabilis na aksyon na available kahit saan
shortcuts.showHelp: Ipakita ang mga shortcut sa keyboard

confirm.transcriptionEnable: I-enable ang transkripsyon ng tawag para sa lahat ng boluntaryo? Gumagamit ito ng AI para ma-transcribe ang mga tawag sa real-time.
confirm.transcriptionDisable: I-disable ang transkripsyon ng tawag? Hindi na awtomatikong ma-transcribe ang mga tawag ng mga boluntaryo.
confirm.captchaTitle: Baguhin ang Setting ng Voice CAPTCHA
confirm.captchaEnable: I-enable ang voice CAPTCHA? Hihilingin sa mga tumatawag na maglagay ng random na numero bago makakonekta.
confirm.captchaDisable: I-disable ang voice CAPTCHA? Direktang makakakonekta ang mga tumatawag nang walang verification.
confirm.rateLimitEnable: I-enable ang rate limiting? Pansamantalang haharangin ang paulit-ulit na tawag mula sa parehong numero.
confirm.rateLimitDisable: I-disable ang rate limiting? Walang limitasyon sa paulit-ulit na tawag mula sa parehong numero.

telephonyProvider.title: Telephony Provider
telephonyProvider.description: Configure the telephony provider used for handling calls
telephonyProvider.phoneNumberHelp: The phone number callers dial (E.164 format)
telephonyProvider.bridgeCallbackUrlHelp: URL where the ARI bridge sends webhooks to this app

providerDescriptions.twilio: Industry-standard cloud telephony. Easiest to set up with excellent documentation.
providerDescriptions.signalwire: Twilio-compatible API at lower cost. Drop-in replacement for most use cases.
providerDescriptions.vonage: Global telephony provider with strong international coverage and competitive pricing.
providerDescriptions.plivo: Cost-effective cloud telephony with a clean API. Good for budget-conscious deployments.
providerDescriptions.asterisk: Self-hosted PBX for maximum control and lowest per-minute cost. Requires server setup.

telephonyProvider.notImplemented: This provider is not yet implemented. Please use Twilio or SignalWire.
telephonyProvider.webrtcConfigHelp: I-enable ang pagtawag gamit ang browser para sa mga boluntaryo. Nangangailangan ng karagdagang mga kredensyal.
telephonyProvider.apiKeySidHelp: Bumuo ng API Key sa iyong Twilio/SignalWire console
telephonyProvider.twimlAppSidHelp: Gumawa ng TwiML App na may voice URL na nakaturo sa iyong webhook

customFields.title: Mga Custom na Field ng Tala
customFields.description: Magdagdag ng karagdagang mga field na lalabas sa form ng tala
customFields.noFields: Walang mga custom na field na tinukoy
customFields.maxFields: Naabot na ang maximum na 20 field
customFields.deleteConfirm: Burahin ang field na ito? Ang mga umiiral na tala na may field na ito ay mananatili ang kanilang data.
customFields.locationEncryptionNote: Ang data ng lokasyon ay naka-encrypt kasama ng nilalaman ng tala (zero-knowledge)

volunteerProfile.messagingEnabledDescription: Allow this volunteer to handle messaging conversations

notifications.promptText: Enable notifications to get alerted when calls come in.
notifications.statusDefault: Browser notifications have not been enabled yet.
notifications.statusDenied: Notifications are blocked. Update your browser's site settings to enable them.
notifications.statusUnsupported: Your browser does not support notifications.

pwa.installText: Install this app for quick access and a better experience.

pinChallenge.title: Verify Your Identity
pinChallenge.description: Enter your PIN to continue with this action.
pinChallenge.maxAttempts: Maximum attempts exceeded. Key has been wiped.

recording.title: Call Recording
recording.transcriptionNotSupported: Your browser does not support local transcription
recording.transcribingLocally: Transcribing locally — audio stays on your device

rcs.title: RCS Channel
rcs.description: Google RCS Business Messaging for rich messaging experiences.
rcs.fallbackToSmsDesc: Send via SMS when RCS is unavailable for the recipient.

signal.title: Signal Channel
signal.description: End-to-end encrypted messaging via Signal bridge.
signal.e2eeNote: Signal provides end-to-end encryption to the bridge. Messages are re-encrypted with your hotline's keys before storage.

security.transportLabel: Transport: Signal (E2EE to bridge, strongest available)
security.bridgeDecryptionNotice: Signal provides strong transport encryption. Messages are decrypted at our self-hosted bridge server (within your infrastructure) for processing, then re-encrypted for storage. The bridge requires ongoing maintenance as Signal updates its protocol.

signalRegistration.title: Signal Number Registration
signalRegistration.description: Register your hotline phone number with Signal. The verification code will be intercepted automatically from your incoming SMS.
signalRegistration.notConfigured: Signal number is not yet registered. Register to enable Signal messaging.
signalRegistration.waitingSmsDescription: The verification code will be intercepted automatically from your incoming SMS. This may take a few minutes.
signalRegistration.voiceDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from the verification voice call.
signalRegistration.alreadyInProgress: Registration already in progress — wait for it to expire or refresh the page.

onboarding.backupDescription: Isulat ang recovery key na ito at itago nang maayos. Ito lang ang paraan para ma-recover ang iyong account sa bagong device.
onboarding.recoveryKeyWarning: Isulat ito at itago nang ligtas. Kung mawala ang iyong PIN at ang key na ito, hindi na mare-recover ang iyong account.
onboarding.storageTipsTitle: Paano itago ang iyong recovery key
onboarding.storageTip1: I-save ito sa password manager (1Password, Bitwarden, atbp.)
onboarding.storageTip2: Itago ito sa personal na device na ikaw lamang ang may access
onboarding.storageTip3: Isulat ito at itago sa ligtas na pisikal na lokasyon
onboarding.backupAcknowledge: Nai-save ko na ang aking recovery key sa ligtas na lokasyon
onboarding.confirmPinDescription: Enter the same PIN again to confirm
onboarding.pinDescription: Choose a 6-digit PIN to protect your key on this device
onboarding.subtitle: Secure crisis response hotline
onboarding.title: Your Secret Key

pin.createDescription: Pumili ng 6 na digit na PIN para protektahan ang iyong susi sa device na ito
pin.confirmDescription: Ilagay muli ang iyong PIN para kumpirmahin
pin.tooShort: Ang PIN ay dapat 6 na digit
pin.mismatch: Hindi magkatugma ang mga PIN. Subukan muli.
pin.confirmSubtitle: Enter the same PIN again to confirm
pin.lockoutRemaining: Locked out. Try again in %d seconds.
pin.setSubtitle: Choose a 6-8 digit PIN to protect your key

deviceLink.title: I-link ang Device
deviceLink.description: I-setup ang device na ito sa pamamagitan ng pag-link nito sa iyong umiiral na account.
deviceLink.instructions: Sa iyong pangunahing device, pumunta sa Settings at buksan ang seksyong 'Mga Naka-link na Device'. Pagkatapos ay i-scan ang QR code o ilagay ang code na ipinapakita dito.
deviceLink.scanFromPrimary: I-scan ang code na ito mula sa Settings ng iyong pangunahing device.
deviceLink.orEnterCode: O ilagay ang code na ito sa iyong pangunahing device:
deviceLink.expiresIn5: Mag-e-expire ang code na ito sa loob ng 5 minuto.
deviceLink.linkSuccessDesc: Ang iyong account ay available na sa device na ito. Mag-set ng PIN para protektahan ito.
deviceLink.linkExpired: Nag-expire na ang linking session. Pakisubukan muli.
deviceLink.linkedDevicesDesc: I-link ang bagong device sa iyong account sa pamamagitan ng paglalagay ng provisioning code nito.
deviceLink.linkFromPrimary: Para mag-link ng bagong device, buksan ang Hotline app sa bagong device, i-tap ang 'I-link ang device na ito', pagkatapos ay ilagay ang ipinapakitang code sa ibaba.
deviceLink.codePlaceholder: I-paste ang QR data o code...
deviceLink.invalidCode: Hindi valid ang provisioning code. Paki-scan ang QR code o kopyahin ang buong code.
deviceLink.verifySASDesc: Compare this code with the code shown on your primary device.
deviceLink.verifySASPrimary: Verify this code matches the code on the new device:
deviceLink.compareCodes: Both devices must show the same code. If the codes don't match, do NOT proceed — an attacker may be present.
deviceLink.sasMismatch: Security codes did not match. The linking session has been aborted for your safety. Please try again.
deviceLink.decryptFailed: Failed to decrypt key from primary device. Please try again.
deviceLink.cameraPermission: Camera permission is required to scan QR codes
deviceLink.verifySubtitle: Confirm the code matches on both devices

blasts.title: Message Blasts
blasts.noBlasts: No blasts yet. Create one to get started.
blasts.selectOrCreate: Select a blast or create a new one
blasts.fillRequired: Please fill in name and message
blasts.doubleOptInDesc: Require subscribers to confirm before receiving blasts

profileSettings.securityKeysDescription: Manage WebAuthn credentials for step-up authentication
profileSettings.keyBackupNote: Store your recovery key safely — it cannot be recovered if lost

setup.title: Setup Wizard
setup.pinRequired: Enter your PIN to continue setup.
setup.complete: Setup complete! Welcome to your hotline.
setup.identityDescription: Choose a name and language for your crisis hotline.
setup.hotlineNameHelp: This is shown to volunteers in the app. For security, the PWA uses a generic name.
setup.primaryLanguageHelp: The default language for the admin interface and IVR prompts.
setup.channelsDescription: Select the channels your hotline will use. You can enable more later.
setup.channelVoiceDesc: Traditional phone calls routed to on-shift volunteers via parallel ringing.
setup.channelSmsDesc: Text message conversations with callers via your hotline number.
setup.channelWhatsappDesc: WhatsApp messaging for callers who prefer it over phone or SMS.
setup.channelSignalDesc: Signal messaging for maximum caller privacy via a self-hosted bridge.
setup.channelReportsDesc: Encrypted reports submitted directly through the web app. Built-in, no provider needed.
setup.selectOneChannel: Please select at least one channel
setup.providersDescription: Set up the services that power your selected channels.
setup.noProvidersNeeded: No external providers needed for your selected channels. You can proceed to the next step.
setup.signalDescription: Connect to a self-hosted Signal bridge for end-to-end encrypted messaging.
setup.whatsappTwilioNote: WhatsApp messages will be handled through your existing Twilio telephony provider. No additional configuration needed.
setup.settingsDescription: Configure basic settings for your selected channels. You can fine-tune these later.
setup.noSettingsNeeded: No additional settings needed for your selected channels.
setup.queueTimeoutHelp: How long callers wait before being sent to voicemail.
setup.voicemailEnabledHelp: Allow callers to leave a voicemail if no one answers.
setup.autoResponseHelp: Automatically sent when a new conversation starts.
setup.autoResponsePlaceholder: Thank you for reaching out. A volunteer will be with you shortly.
setup.reportCategoriesHelp: Define categories for incoming reports (e.g. Harassment, Threats, Other).
setup.inviteDescription: Generate invite codes for your team. Each code is single-use and expires in 7 days.
setup.summaryDescription: Review your hotline configuration before going live.

bootstrap.title: Create Admin Account
bootstrap.welcomeDescription: Let's create your admin account. Your cryptographic identity is generated in your browser — the server never sees your private key.
bootstrap.noAdminMessage: No admin account configured yet. Complete the setup wizard to get started.

setup.demoModeDescription: Creates sample volunteer accounts, shifts, and ban entries for testing and demos. Demo account credentials will be shown on the login page.

reports.title: Reports
reports.fillRequired: Please fill in the required fields
reports.selectReport: Select a report to view details
reports.dropzone: Drop files here or click to browse
reports.dropzoneLabel: Drop files here or click to browse
reports.videoNotSupported: Your browser does not support video playback.
reports.audioNotSupported: Your browser does not support audio playback.
reports.emptySubtitle: Reports will appear here when created
reports.noReportsHint: No reports yet. Create one to get started.

hubs.title: Hub Management
hubs.createHubDescription: Create a new hub to organize your hotline operations.
hubs.editHubDescription: Update the hub name, description, or phone number.
hubs.hubDescriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of this hub's purpose...
hubs.hubPhoneNumberHelp: The primary phone number for this hub (E.164 format).
hubs.noHubs: No hubs yet. Create a hub to start organizing your hotline.

geocoding.title: Geocoding / Lokasyon
geocoding.description: I-configure ang isang geocoding provider para i-enable ang location autocomplete sa custom fields
geocoding.countriesHelp: Mga 2-letter country code na pinaghihiwalay ng kuwit. Iwanang walang laman para sa buong mundo.
